description: A peaceful river landscape showing a wide bend in the River Oise. The still water reflects green trees and a pale overcast sky. Tall trees stand at the center and right of the composition, their reflections doubling in the water. Low green vegetation and marshland line the banks. Ducks swim on the water at the left. The sky is expansive with soft pink and gray clouds. The overall atmosphere is quiet and contemplative with muted greens and grays.

_meta.title: A Bend in the River Oise
